summary: Live-applied ADR 0315 from the dedicated `codex/ws-0315-live-apply` worktree by converging the governed Windmill operator admin surface on `docker-runtime-lv3`, fixing stale gate-status wrapper drift inherited from the older branch baseline, verifying that the deployed raw-app bundle matches the repo bytes exactly, and preserving the branch-local validation evidence while deferring the protected `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` updates to the exact-main integration step.

verification.observed: `pytest tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py -q` returned `29 passed in 3.29s`.
The temporary raw-app checkout passed `npm ci --no-audit --no-fund` and `npx tsc --noEmit`, and `make syntax-check-windmill` completed successfully from `codex/ws-0315-live-apply`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `scripts/workstream_surface_ownership.py --validate-registry --validate-branch --base-ref origin/main`, `scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, and `scripts/platform_manifest.py --check` all passed after the workstream manifest was expanded to cover the gate-status wrappers, generated diagram, platform manifest, and SBOM receipt.

The first two branch-local replays truthfully failed because the worktree still carried stale copies of `config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py` and `scripts/gate_status.py` from the older baseline. After syncing those wrappers to the current mainline contract, `make converge-windmill` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=314 changed=48 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=99`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=95 changed=6 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=28`, and `proxmox-host : ok=41 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`.

Authenticated verification against `/api/w/lv3/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin` returned the expected raw-app payload, the browser route returned `200`, the deployed `/App.tsx` and `/index.css` SHA-256 digests matched the local worktree exactly, and the live app contains `Next best action`, `Help and recovery`, `Background Refresh`, `Validation Error`, `System Error`, `Unauthorized`, `Not Found`, `Latest Result`, `windmill-operator-access-admin`, and `validate-repository-automation`.

The refreshed `make pre-push-gate` rehearsal passed every remote lane except generated truth. `dependency-graph`, `workstream-surfaces`, and the heavy validation slices were green after the ownership and diagram repairs. The replay still reported `generated-docs` because `README.md` canonical truth is intentionally protected for the exact-main integration step, and it still saw an older `build/platform-manifest.json` snapshot while the replay was in flight; the follow-on `scripts/platform_manifest.py --check` now passes cleanly, leaving the protected `README.md` update as the only remaining branch-local generated-docs blocker.

notes: This branch-local receipt preserves the live replay before the exact-main integration step updates protected release and canonical-truth surfaces.

As of 2026-04-02, `origin/main` is already ahead of this worktree at repository version `0.177.139` and platform version `0.130.87`; the canonical mainline replay still has to occur on that lineage before pushing `origin/main`.

The branch-local replay was executed from the dedicated worktree state rooted at source commit `cbb0c99f3f69c3ab2bb7658daf443c45df9ea49b`; the later exact-main replay will provide the first fully committed canonical source hash for ADR 0315.

The preserved `r1` and `r2` converge failures exposed real stale-baseline drift in `config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py` and `scripts/gate_status.py`, and the branch now carries those latest-main fixes forward for the exact-main merge.
